zh.lifeSummary: 當Azeline Ries於1020年出生在法國巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯可利斯托時，她的父親Hubert De Ryes Steward Of Normandy16歲，母親Albreda Preaux13歲。她於1050年之前與Ralf de Taillebois在法國諾門迪結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1078年在英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德肯達爾享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Azeline Ries于1020年出生在法国巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯可利斯托时，她的父亲Hubert De Ryes Steward Of Normandy16岁，母亲Albreda Preaux13岁。她于1050年之前与Ralf de Taillebois在法国諾門迪结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1078年在英国英格兰維斯特莫藍德肯達爾享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ries
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: South German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from an ancient Germanic personal name, but mainly a nickname for an exceptionally tall or big man, Middle High German rise, German Riese ‘giant’. In some cases the name may have been used to refer ironically to a particularly short man.
South German: habitational name from any of several places called Ries.
German: topographic name from Middle Low German rīs ‘branch, twig, brushwood’.

variants.name: Reas
meanings: Altered form of German   Ries  ,   Riess  .

variants.name: Riese
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Fritz, Horst, Willi.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of   Ries   1.

variants.name: Riess
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Mathias, Kurt, Dietmar, Frieda, Fritz, Gerd, Gottfried, Guenther, Hans, Konrad, Otto, Reinhard.
German: habitational name from an area of Bavaria so named.

variants.name: Ris
meanings: Swiss German: Alemannic variant of   Ries   3 or   Reis   1.
Swiss German: topographic name from Middle High German risi ‘water channel (made of stone or wood) on a mountain’ for someone who lived near such a structure.

nameMeanings.name: Azeline
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: diminutive of Adèle ( see Adele ), used occasionally in England from the early 16th century onwards, and now also found in the wider English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Azeline Ries was born in 1020, in Cristot, Calvados, Lower Normandy, France, her father, Hubert De Ryes Steward Of Normandy, was 16 and her mother, Albreda Preaux, was 13. She married Ralf de Taillebois before 1050, in Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1078, in Kendal, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Azeline Ries est née en 1020, à Cristot, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, France, son père, Hubert De Ryes Steward Of Normandy, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Albreda Preaux, avait 13 ans. Elle a épousé Ralf de Taillebois avant 1050, à Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1078, à Kendal, Westmorland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Azeline Ries 1020 in Cristot, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hubert De Ryes Steward Of Normandy 16 und ihre Mutter Albreda Preaux 13. Sie hat vor 1050 in Normandie, Frankreich Ralf de Taillebois geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1078 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Kendal, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Azeline Ries è nata il nel 1020 nel Cristot, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Hubert De Ryes Steward Of Normandy, aveva 16 anni e sua madre, Albreda Preaux, aveva 13 anni. Lei sposato Ralf de Taillebois prima del 1050, nel Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1078, nel Kendal, Westmorland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Azeline Riesが1020年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディカルヴァドスクリストトで生まれた時，父Hubert De Ryes Steward Of Normandyは16歳，母Albreda Preauxは13歳であった。1050年以前にフランスノーマンディでRalf de Tailleboisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1078年にイギリスイギリスウエストモーランドケンダルで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Azeline Ries(이)가 1020년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 캘바도스 크리스토트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hubert De Ryes Steward Of Normandy(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Albreda Preaux(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 1050년 이전 프랑스 노먼디에서 Ralf de Taillebois(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1078년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드 켄다에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Azeline Ries nasceu em 1020, em Cristot, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, França, seu pai, Hubert De Ryes Steward Of Normandy, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Albreda Preaux, tinha 13 anos. Ela casou-se com Ralf de Taillebois antes 1050, em Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1078, em Kendal, Westmorland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Azeline Ries родилась в 1020 г. в местности кристот, калвадос, бассе-норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Hubert De Ryes Steward Of Normandy было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Albreda Preaux, 13. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralf de Taillebois перед 1050 г. в местности норманди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1078 г. в местности кендаль, вестморланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Azeline Ries nació en 1020, en Cristot, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Hubert De Ryes Steward Of Normandy, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Albreda Preaux, tenía 13 años. Se casó con Ralf de Taillebois antes de 1050, en Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1078, en Kendal, Westmorland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 58 años.
